underlying_goal: Pick up a Linear ticket to prefill first speaker name and language in a form, implement the changes, ship a PR, fix CI failures, and address code review feedback
friction_detail: Linear MCP tools weren't initially available requiring user to auth, vitest tests had ResizeObserver and i18n translation issues requiring multiple CI fix cycles.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement a Linear ticket for prefilling speaker name/language in a form, ship a PR, and fix CI issues — the PR was successfully shipped with all relevant checks passing.
